name: Contribution Score
summary: Scores how much value a user adds through comments: recent, upvoted comments count more; self-serving or downvoted ones count less. Optional bonus when the project owner upvotes.
description:
**Formulas:**
- **Base score:** `baseScore = comment_base_score + upvotes × comment_upvote_weight - downvotes × comment_downvote_weight`.
- **Time weight:** `tw = max(0, 1 - bucket × monthly_decay_rate_percent/100)`; comments older than `engagement_window_months` get tw = 0.
- **Self-interaction:** `discountMultiplier = self_interaction_penalty_factor^discountConditions` (0, 1, or 2 conditions: own project, reply-to-self).
- **Owner bonus:** `ownerBonus = project_owner_upvote_bonus_multiplier` if project owner upvoted, else 1.
- **Per-comment:** `score = ownerBonus × tw × discountMultiplier × baseScore`.
- **Per-user:** `contribution_score = Σ(score)` over the user's comments.

**Inputs:**
- No manual file upload. Data is fetched from DeepFunding Portal APIs.

**Output:**
- Per-user contribution score (CSV: `user_id`, `contribution_score`) plus an optional JSON details file with per-comment breakdown for debugging.

inputs.label: Comment Base Score
inputs.description: Baseline in baseScore formula: baseScore = comment_base_score + upvotes × comment_upvote_weight - downvotes × comment_downvote_weight.

inputs.label: Comment Upvote Weight
inputs.description: Points added per upvote in baseScore: baseScore = comment_base_score + upvotes × comment_upvote_weight - ...

inputs.label: Comment Downvote Weight
inputs.description: Points subtracted per downvote in baseScore: baseScore = ... - downvotes × comment_downvote_weight.

inputs.label: Self Interaction Penalty Factor
inputs.description: Self-interaction discount: discountMultiplier = self_interaction_penalty_factor^discountConditions (each condition: own project or reply-to-self). 0 = max penalty, 1 = no penalty.

inputs.label: Project Owner Upvote Bonus Multiplier
inputs.description: When project owner upvoted: ownerBonus = this value in score = ownerBonus × tw × discountMultiplier × baseScore. 1 = no bonus.

inputs.label: Engagement Window (Months)
inputs.description: Comments older than this many months get tw = 0 and do not contribute. Must be between 1 and 72.

inputs.label: Monthly Decay Rate (%)
inputs.description: Time decay: tw = max(0, 1 - bucket × value/100), bucket = floor(age_months). 0 = no decay, 100 = full decay after one month.

outputs.label: Contribution Score by User
outputs.description: Per-user CSV with columns: user_id (DeepFunding user ID), contribution_score (numeric score).

outputs.label: Contribution Score Details (JSON)
outputs.description: Full per-user breakdown including per-comment scoring components and intermediate values. For debugging and auditing.
